steps.name: Add AVIF files
steps.text: Drag AVIF files onto the drop zone or click to select.

steps.name: Convert
steps.text: Click convert. PNG is lossless - no quality setting needed.

steps.name: Download PNG
steps.text: Download files individually or all at once.

items.title: 1. Lisaa tiedostoja
items.description: Drag AVIF files or click to select.

items.title: 3. Lataa
items.description: Download individually or all at once.

items.title: Privacy
items.description: Files stay on your device. Nothing is uploaded.

items.title: No limits
items.description: Convert as many files as you need.

items.title: Bulk download
items.description: Download all files with one click.

items.question: AVIF → PNG?
items.answer: Muunna AVIF-tiedostot haviottomaan PNG-muotoon. Taysi laatu ja lapinakyvyys sailytetty.

items.question: Server upload?
items.answer: No. Everything runs locally in your browser. Files never leave your device.

items.question: Multiple files?
items.answer: Yes. Add as many files as you like. No limits.

contentBlocks.title: Auta meitä parantamaan tyokaluja
contentBlocks.description: Onko sinulla idea, loysitko virheen tai haluatko ehdottaa toimintoa? Kirjoita meille - vastaamme 24 tunnin kuluessa.
